prompt: A cinematic medium-full shot of a man with a short brown beard and brown hair, standing centered under a rustic stone archway in a dense garden. He is wearing a sage green corduroy jacket with chest pockets over a white t-shirt, black pants, and a watch with a black strap. He is looking off to the side with a calm expression. The image features a heavy radial "swirl" motion blur that distorts the foreground leaves and the edges of the frame into a circular vortex. To the left of the man, there is a transparent "ghostly" double-exposure silhouette of his torso. Sunlight filters through the canopy, casting sharp, dappled leaf shadows onto his green jacket while leaving his face brightly and evenly lit. The camera is at a low angle, using a wide-angle lens with a shallow depth of field. High-contrast greens, white wild roses, and a surreal, dreamlike atmosphere. ar 4:5
